subject: Our Q3 Strategy and Priorities
body: As we close out this quarter, I want to share where we're focusing our energy for Q3: doubling down on enterprise expansion, accelerating Project Helios adoption, and investing in platform reliability. See the attached deck for the full breakdown.

subject: Welcoming Jordan Alvarez as Our New Chief Product Officer
body: I'm excited to share that Jordan Alvarez is joining us as our new Chief Product Officer, effective next month. Jordan previously led product at two high-growth SaaS companies and will be a huge addition to our leadership team.

subject: Introducing Our New Employee Stock Purchase Plan
body: We're rolling out a new Employee Stock Purchase Plan starting next month, giving everyone the chance to invest directly in Acme's future at a discount. Enrollment details to follow.

subject: Scheduled Network Maintenance This Weekend
body: VPN access will be intermittent this Saturday from 10pm-2am PT while we perform scheduled network maintenance.

subject: Sprint 42 Planning Notes
body: Notes from today's Sprint 42 planning session are attached. Please review your assigned tickets before standup tomorrow.
